cards.name: invasion of tarkir
cards.text: When this siege enters, reveal any number of dragon cards from your hand. When you do, this siege deals X plus 2 damage to any other target, where X is the number of cards revealed this way.

bside.name: defiant thundermaw
bside.text: When this siege enters, reveal any number of dragon cards from your hand. When you do, this siege deals X plus 2 damage to any other target, where X is the number of cards revealed this way.
